title: Porcelainware
description: High-temperature refractory porcelain items including crucibles, basins, and funnels, suitable for extreme thermal analysis.

subcategories.name: Crucibles
subcategories.description: High-temperature refractory vessels for ashing, ignition, and thermal analysis. Rated for temperatures up to 1150°C.

subcategories.name: Evaporating Basins
subcategories.description: Flat-bottomed porcelain dishes for controlled solvent evaporation, concentration, and crystallization procedures.

subcategories.name: Buchner Funnels
subcategories.description: Perforated porcelain funnels designed for vacuum filtration setups, compatible with standard filter papers.

subcategories.name: Vials, Cells & Cuvettes
subcategories.description: Porcelain and ceramic sample containers for spectroscopy, thermal analysis, and high-temperature sample storage.

subcategories.name: Mortars & Pestles
subcategories.description: Glazed and unglazed porcelain grinding tools for sample preparation, homogenization, and particle size reduction.
